title: Bloomlash
pitch: Your whip is weapon and seed drill — every crack plants your build straight into the arena.
howto: Crack the whip to sting pests and plant a seed where the tip snaps. Guard fragile sprouts until they grow into thorn hedges, buffing sunblooms, fruit turrets and slowing roots. Earn Bloom Essence for seed unlocks and gardener upgrades; champion plants persist between runs.
controls: Drag to move. Tap to crack the whip (it plants the selected seed). Tap the bottom buttons to switch seeds. WASD optional on desktop.
